text.title: ref-pmbok Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ref-pmbok as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent output contains "Integration Management", "Cost Management", or "Communications Management" as domain names.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These are PMBoK 6 knowledge area names. In PMBoK 7/8 these are replaced by Governance, Finance, and integrated Stakeholders respectively. Output containing these names must be regenerated with PMBoK 7/8 vocabulary pinned.

failure-mode.description: Agent applies EVM metrics to a pure-agile project with no scope or cost baseline.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: EVM requires a baseline. Without one, SPI and CPI are undefined. Agile metrics (cycle time, flow efficiency, throughput) must be used instead.

failure-mode.description: "RAG" used without spelling out Red/Amber/Green on first use in PM contexts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: "RAG" is also retrieval-augmented generation. In PM system prompts, abbreviation without disambiguation causes agents to hallucinate RAG retrieval references in status reports.
